pr.title: Match synth and Ice Mountain functions
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: Matched three Ice Mountain functions in src/melee/gr/gricemt.c and cleaned up synth evidence by removing an obsolete residual-match note for HSD_Synth_80388DC8 and tightening HSD_Synth_8038B120's header prototype to void(void). The Ice Mountain changes used source-shape adjustments including assert expansion, an inline helper returning gv.icemt2.xC8 jobj pointers, PAD_STACK(24), grIm_804DB570 instead of an inline -20.0f literal, and #pragma auto_inline off near grIceMt_801F71E8.

key_files.role: Main matching work for grIceMt_801F96E0, grIceMt_801F993C, and grIceMt_801FA0BC; source-shape edits and matching tactics.
evidence_refs: diff: gricemt.c hunks around grIceMt_801F71E8, grIceMt_801F96E0, grIceMt_801F993C, grIceMt_801FA0BC
pr_body: claims three Ice Mountain functions brought to 100%

key_files.role: Removed obsolete todo noting HSD_Synth_80388DC8 was only a 97.2% match.
evidence_refs: diff: removed two-line todo before HSD_Synth_80388DC8
pr_body: says obsolete residual-match note was removed

key_files.role: Updated HSD_Synth_8038B120 declaration from unknown return/params to void(void).
evidence_refs: diff: UNK_RET HSD_Synth_8038B120(UNK_PARAMS) changed to void HSD_Synth_8038B120(void)
pr_body: says signature tightened to existing void(void) definition

what_changed.text: Added #pragma auto_inline off immediately before grIceMt_801F71E8.
In grIceMt_801F96E0, HSD_ASSERT macro calls for mgobj and jobj were expanded into explicit NULL checks calling __assert with grIm_803E4068-based file/message references.
In grIceMt_801F993C, HSD_ASSERTMSG checks for upper_ix and under_ix bounds were expanded into explicit __assert calls using grIm_803E4068 offsets for assertion text.
Replaced two wrapper inlines around grIceMt_801F71E8 with static inline HSD_JObj** grIceMt_FA0BC_jobjs(Ground* g), returning &g->gv.icemt2.xC8.
Reshaped grIceMt_801FA0BC local variables and calls: used gobj/gp/frame names, direct grIceMt_801F71E8 calls, PAD_STACK(24), grIm_804DB570 * Ground_801C0498(), and explicit jobjs[0..3] NULL checks.
Removed the HSD_Synth_80388DC8 todo about a 97.2% residual register-allocation mismatch.
Changed HSD_Synth_8038B120 prototype in synth.h from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(void).

smart_moves.text: The PR paired a header prototype cleanup with require-protos verification, which is aligned with recovering truthful function signatures when the body already proves void(void).
evidence_refs: pr_body: tightens HSD_Synth_8038B120 to existing void(void) definition

smart_moves.text: The Ice Mountain matching work localized source-shape helpers to gricemt.c rather than spreading declarations or helper changes across broader headers.
evidence_refs: diff: gricemt.c adds static inline grIceMt_FA0BC_jobjs
changed_files: only gricemt.c, synth.c, synth.h changed

smart_moves.text: The PR removed a stale match-progress comment after the author claimed HSD_Synth_80388DC8 reached 100%, reducing misleading residual-match documentation.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a function body already proves a concrete signature, update the owning header and run require-protos rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: diff: synth.h HSD_Synth_8038B120 changed to void(void)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small, local source-shape helpers can be enough to close near-matching stage functions, but tactics such as PAD_STACK, pragmas, and raw __assert expansion should be recorded as match-specific rather than generalized style.
evidence_refs: pr_body: says Ice Mountain functions reached 100% using small source-shape helpers

naming_conventions.name: gobj
naming_conventions.context: grIceMt_801FA0BC renamed mgobj to gobj for the HSD_GObj* returned from grIceMt_801F71E8.
evidence_refs: diff: grIceMt_801FA0BC local HSD_GObj* mgobj changed to HSD_GObj* gobj

naming_conventions.name: gp
naming_conventions.context: Ground* local renamed from gp2 to gp in grIceMt_801FA0BC.
evidence_refs: diff: grIceMt_801FA0BC local Ground* gp2 changed to Ground* gp

naming_conventions.name: frame
naming_conventions.context: f32 f renamed to frame for the value returned by grIceMt_801F993C.
evidence_refs: diff: grIceMt_801FA0BC local f32 f changed to f32 frame

naming_conventions.name: grIceMt_FA0BC_jobjs
naming_conventions.context: Helper name ties the accessor to grIceMt_801FA0BC and returns the jobj pointer array at gv.icemt2.xC8.
evidence_refs: diff: static inline HSD_JObj** grIceMt_FA0BC_jobjs(Ground* g)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: #pragma auto_inline off was introduced before grIceMt_801F71E8.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded standards treat pragmas as exceptions requiring tight scope and adjacent evidence; the PR slice shows the pragma and reported matches but does not include reviewer rationale or adjacent-function analysis.
Loaded standards require explicit verifier evidence for PAD_STACK. The bot report and PR body provide match evidence, but no detailed objdiff explanation is included.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: HSD_ASSERT and HSD_ASSERTMSG macros were replaced with explicit NULL/condition checks and __assert calls using grIm_803E4068 offsets.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This is match-specific evidence; loaded standards usually prefer mapping raw asserts back to macros when possible.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A small inline accessor, grIceMt_FA0BC_jobjs, was used to express &g->gv.icemt2.xC8 before iterating jobjs[0..3].
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The slice supports this as a local matching helper, not as a global accessor convention.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: The inline literal -20.0f was replaced by grIm_804DB570 in grIceMt_801FA0BC translation calculations.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The slice does not include section ownership details for grIm_804DB570; treat as PR-local evidence.

review_feedback.text: GALE01 report showed matched code 69.84% (+0.04%, +1536 bytes), with 3 new gricemt matches: grIceMt_801FA0BC, grIceMt_801F96E0, and grIceMt_801F993C all reaching 100.00%. It also reported one .sdata2 improvement in main/melee/gr/gricemt from 69.70% to 71.88%.

No local source files beyond the diff were inspected; path facts and global conventions are not promoted from this intake.

source_update_candidates.title: gricemt.c PR-specific matching tactics used in PR #2569
source_update_candidates.text: For src/melee/gr/gricemt.c, PR #2569 used raw __assert expansions with grIm_803E4068 offsets, PAD_STACK(24), #pragma auto_inline off near grIceMt_801F71E8, and a local grIceMt_FA0BC_jobjs helper to reach 100% for grIceMt_801F96E0, grIceMt_801F993C, and grIceMt_801FA0BC. Because these overlap with globally cautioned tactics, record only as historical path evidence if useful.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Ice Mountain functions brought to 100%
source_update_candidates.reason: This may help future gricemt work understand existing unusual source shapes without promoting them as general standards.

source_update_candidates.title: synth.h HSD_Synth_8038B120 signature recovery
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2569 updated HSD_Synth_8038B120's header declaration to void HSD_Synth_8038B120(void), with PR body stating this matches the existing definition and verification including require-protos.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful as historical evidence for removing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS when a body proves the signature.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that raw __assert expansion is preferred style; loaded standards say assert/report macros should usually be used when they represent the source-level form.
Do not infer that #pragma auto_inline off or PAD_STACK are generally acceptable in gricemt; this PR only supports them as narrow historical matching tactics with reported match outcomes.
Do not claim human reviewer approval or rationale; the slice contains no review comments.
Do not promote the .sdata2 bot-report improvement into a data-ownership lesson; the PR did not describe data-section work and the diff does not establish ownership.
